text:
with the current package:

❯ julia
ERROR: Unable to find compatible target in system image.

The port is broken as well, for example, does not install cert.pem or libz.so.1.

❯ uname -a
FreeBSD och.pentode.fi 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC amd64
